infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Used indoors to fingerprint your starting location by sensing nearby Bluetooth devices.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Used indoors to fingerprint your starting location by sensing nearby Bluetooth devices.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Used to count your steps and detect when you complete a lap.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used outdoors to detect when you've completed a lap by tracking your GPS position relative to your starting point.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Used outdoors to keep counting laps while the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Used outdoors to keep counting laps while the app is in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Used outdoors to keep counting laps while the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Used outdoors to detect when you've completed a lap by tracking your GPS position relative to your starting point.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Used indoors to fingerprint your starting location by sensing nearby Bluetooth devices.
